        suitable_genders = [g.value for g in Gender]
        suitable_races = [r.value for r in Race]
        suitable_employment_status = [e.value for e in EmploymentStatus]
        suitable_education = [edu.value for edu in Education]
        suitable_marital_status = [m.value for m in MaritalStatus]
        suitable_religion = [re.value for re in Religion]

            self.marital_status in suitable_marital_status and
            self.religion in suitable_religion and
            self.major in suitable_major and
            self.attention_to_detail in suitable_attention_to_detail):
            return True
        else:
            return False
